name: Fallen Fey
tagline: Twist fey-touched magic into curses and corrupted gifts.

baseAbility.name: Fey-Blessing
baseAbility.description: Swift action, self only. Activate a fey-blessing (a themed self-buff); you start with one that gives a scaling bonus to initiative and a few skills within a favored terrain. As a separate swift action you can also become fey-typed for 1 min/CL. Additional fey-blessings are unlocked by talents, and more than one can run at once (each activated and paid for separately).

talents.name: Shifting Glamour (fey-blessing)
talents.description: New fey-blessing: minor cosmetic shapeshifting, useful for disguise rather than combat.

talents.name: Unthreatening Form (fey-blessing)
talents.description: New fey-blessing: a base transformation (compatible with Alteration sphere traits) that makes you look harmless.

talents.name: Wilder Kinship (fey-blessing)
talents.description: New fey-blessing: improved rapport with fey and natural creatures.

talents.name: Call Fey
talents.description: Summon temporary fey allies whose combined Hit Dice can't exceed your caster level.

talents.name: Call Plants
talents.description: Summon temporary plant creature allies whose combined Hit Dice can't exceed your caster level.

talents.name: Meld Into Tree (fey-blessing)
talents.description: New fey-blessing: merge yourself and your gear into a tree as a hiding spot.

talents.name: Grimalkin's Chill (fey-blessing)
talents.description: New fey-blessing: a chilling touch attack plus the ability to turn incorporeal at will.

talents.name: Fey Return (fey-blessing)
talents.description: New fey-blessing: if you die while it's active, you reincarnate shortly after at the cost of a negative level.

talents.name: Curse
talents.description: Add a lingering curse effect on top of one of your fey-blessings when applied to an unwilling target.

talents.name: Sugar Sticks (fey-blessing)
talents.description: New fey-blessing: manifest a minor consumable treat with a small beneficial effect.
